PT PurrTrail Private cat stickerbook
Support Privacy

PurrTrail Privacy Policy

Summary

PurrTrail is a local-first cat stickerbook. In V1, encounter notes, collection progress, streaks, local media previews, and optional private places stay on the user's device.

No Data Collection

PurrTrail does not collect data from users in V1. The app does not require an account, does not use advertising SDKs, does not use analytics SDKs, and does not send encounter data to a PurrTrail server.

Local Data

Saved encounters, collection cards, trail points, streak state, and app settings are stored locally on the device. Users can delete saved encounters and local media previews from inside the app.

Location

Location access is optional and only used when the user chooses to add a private place to an encounter. Exact places stay private on the device. Any share preview or public-safe export uses approximate area language or hides the place entirely.

Photos And Camera

Camera access is optional and only used when the user chooses to save a live field note. Photo-library selection uses the system picker. Imported images are stored as stripped local previews for the private stickerbook experience.

Diagnostics

The app can prepare a redacted support summary on device. That summary is designed to omit exact places, private note text, media file paths, image bytes, and raw image metadata.

Children

PurrTrail is designed for humane, private observation. It does not include public social features, comments, direct messages, public real-time animal maps, or precise place sharing.

Contact

For privacy questions or support requests, contact support@purrtrail.app.

PurrTrail is local-first in V1: no account, no ads SDK, no analytics SDK, and no server sync.

Contact support · Privacy policy
